claim_boundary: Product idea portfolio only. It proves that a product surface is mapped to repo assets and a sellable MVP shape. It does not prove production readiness, live customer traffic, external DPI bypass, settlement finality, production SLOs, or field deployment. This payment intake proves only that a wallet-based checkout package exists. It does not prove funds were received.

buyer_steps: Agree the exact EVM network and token with the operator before sending funds.
Use reference X0T-PILOT-6017E099 in the invoice, email, or chat thread.
Return the transaction hash for local verification.

claim_gate.claim_boundary: Product idea portfolio only. It proves that a product surface is mapped to repo assets and a sellable MVP shape. It does not prove production readiness, live customer traffic, external DPI bypass, settlement finality, production SLOs, or field deployment. This payment intake proves only that a wallet-based checkout package exists. It does not prove funds were received.

operator_steps: Send the buyer the payment intake document or PRODUCT tab screenshot.
Confirm chain, token, amount, and payment reference before payment.
After payment, verify the transaction hash on the selected chain.
Only then mark funds as received in local records.

pilot_package_claim_gate.claim_boundary: Product idea portfolio only. It proves that a product surface is mapped to repo assets and a sellable MVP shape. It does not prove production readiness, live customer traffic, external DPI bypass, settlement finality, production SLOs, or field deployment.
